sections.paragraph:
fem. (from the root רָנַן)-

(1) shouting for joy, Psa 30:6 42:5 47:2 . 1Ki 22:36, וַיַּעֲבֹר הָרִנָּה בַּמַּחֲנֶה … לֵאמֹר “and there went through the camp a joyful cry: Home!”

(2) a mournful cry, wailing (Wimmern), Psa 17:1 61:2 , and frequently.

(3) [Rinnah], pr.n. m. 1Ch 4:20.
